tagline: Verifies a provider against primary sources and enrolls them — the committee signs the privileging decision.
problem: Credentialing is months of repetitive primary-source verification, and a negligent-credentialing miss is direct liability — every clinician is re-verified by every payer.
outcome: Licenses, education and history are primary-source verified and payer enrollments submitted straight-through; the committee signs the privileging decision and every adverse finding.

steps.does: Collect the provider profile from CAQH and intake documents
Primary-source verify licenses, DEA, education and malpractice history
Screen OIG / SAM exclusions and reconcile discrepancies
The credentialing committee signs the privileging decision / adverse findings
Run continuous exclusion monitoring and the re-credentialing cycle
